key.name: debug-logging
key.description: When enabled, writes diagnostic messages to the system journal.

key.name: overview-on-last-workspace
key.summary: Open overview when switching to the last workspace
key.description: Automatically opens the GNOME overview when the active workspace becomes the last (empty) one.

key.name: float-sizes
key.summary: Saved float sizes per window class
key.description: JSON map of wm_class → {wr, hr} fractions of work area, saved when a floating window is tiled by the user.

key.name: tile-left
key.summary: Tile focused window to the left

key.name: tile-right
key.summary: Tile focused window to the right

key.name: window-rules
key.description: JSON array of window rule objects with conditions and actions.

key.name: on-empty-workspace
key.summary: Action when last window on workspace is closed
key.description: What to do when the active workspace becomes empty. "prev" navigates to the adjacent workspace, "overview" opens the GNOME overview, "nothing" does nothing.
